rationale.root_cause: The response cites a nonexistent make_array function and wrong line numbers, not the actual use-after-free at printLine(data) after free(data) in CWE416_Use_After_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad().
rationale.local_fix: It suggests removing free in a nonexistent function rather than moving the print before free or keeping data allocated until after use in this file.
rationale.global_fix: It recommends explicit ownership/RAII (e.g., smart pointers) to manage lifetime, which satisfies the global requirement to make object lifetime explicit.
